name: Monk
summary: Disciplined martial artist. Lightly armed and armored but exceptionally agile and resilient against magic.

class_features.name: AC Bonus
class_features.summary: When unarmored and unencumbered: add Wis bonus (if positive) and +1/4 levels above 1 to AC and CMD.

class_features.name: Flurry of Blows
class_features.summary: As a full-attack, may make one extra attack as if using two-weapon fighting (full BAB for both attacks at level 1, treated as monk weapon).

class_features.name: Stunning Fist
class_features.summary: Once per day per level (1/day at L1), forces a Fort save (DC 10 + 1/2 level + Wis) on a successful attack or be stunned 1 round.

class_features.name: Unarmed Strike
class_features.summary: Unarmed deals 1d6 (medium) lethal damage; threat range x2; counts as both armed and unarmed.

class_features.name: Bonus Feat
class_features.summary: At 1st level, choose one: Catch Off-Guard, Combat Reflexes, Deflect Arrows, Dodge, Improved Grapple, Scorpion Style, Throw Anything.
